prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-AC4OGSSB-BUN-4PK-4OZ-CLR Product Type: BOTTLE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 4pk ASR 5.25" Plastic Heavy Duty Gold Snifter Bottle w/ Nozzle (4 oz Volume) Description: Snifter Bottles are an ideal tool for all craft and hobby enthusiasts. This handy bottle is perfect for extracting small parts.

Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab craft supplies and put them where they need to go.

Each snifter bottle is 5.25" tall and holds 4 ounces of liquid, and can be used for countless hobbies and crafts. Make sure to keep some of these around for all your craft projects.

Other great uses include gold panning - use a snifter bottle to pick up small nuggets and gems.

Please note: this listing is a 4 pack. Search Terms: gold snifter outdoors hobby crafts Features: - Combined Size of Nozzle & Bottle: 5" x 1 9/10" Diameter - Volume: 4 Fluid Ounces - Tube Size: 4" x 3/16" Diameter - Tube Thickness: 1/32" - Great for Gold Prospecting, Hobbies, Crafts, Home, Office & More! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-pk 4 oz Gold Snifter Bottle

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4 Oz Capacity, Heavy Duty Plastic, Gold Panning, Crafts And Hobbies, Precision Suction Nozzle

openai.title_differentiation: 4 Pack, 4 Oz Each, 525" Tall, Heavy Duty Plastic, Fine Nozzle, For Gold Prospecting, Crafts And Hobby Use
